text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, our summer camp begins. We'll be spending the next few
weeks getting in some good training by the beach.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...Or at least, that was the plan.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I have a sudden urge to prove a theory that I've been losing sleep
formulating. But before we start the experiment—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, how are you feeling?! Your body temperature? Hours slept?
Food consumed?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Your condition could greatly affect the results, you see. As such, I
must record this data before the experiment!
choice_data_list: Weren't we going to train tod—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh... My theory concerns the increase of running speeds. You
could call it another form of training!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Though, you'll be the one putting in the work.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha! Don't worry, this time you'll stay conscious.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
All right, first we'll measure the energy consumption of your organs
under extreme stress. Then we'll crank things up step by step—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tachyon continues talking to herself. Looks like she has no intention
of partaking in normal training.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
—Which is why it's about time you stopped subscribing to the tired
notion that summer camp means a montage of us running along the
beach. Try to think outside the box.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
There's no time for us to be twiddling our thumbs when we should be
pursuing the limits of speed. Now, let us begin the experiment!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
First, we'll utilize the incline of this road to stimulate your
cardiopulmonary functions!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
To get good data, you'll need to run to the beach and back at least
three times.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Is your measuring instrument ready? It'll record your oxygen levels
once a lap, so don't forget it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Also, no matter how exhausted you get—don't stop running. I want
data from when you're near your limit.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What? All you have to do is empty your mind and run like a hamster
on a wheel!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But you are only a guinea pig, so I'm not expecting you to run as well
as a hamster.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Fear not—I'll be accompanying you. Someone has to make sure you
don't veer off course.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...And there goes my last hope of escape.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Come on, you can do it, Trainer! Lift those thighs higher! Right—keep
up this pace!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Keep your breathing steady! Otherwise, you'll make things harder on
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Excellent, are you near your limit? We still have two laps to
go! Just a little bit more!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm... You suffered greater muscle fatigue than I had expected. Your
legs aren't shaking, but I can see that you're trying your best to keep
standing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Okay then, let's move on to the next experiment. I want to collect
data on your respiratory organs as you run up a slope in this state.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh, this will be a gold mine of data! This could open the door
to the potential we seek—the precursor to something great!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Or, it would've been. Looking at you, you're not almost at your
limit—you're past it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It appears my calculations were off. Since we can't get the data right
now, we'll have to reschedule the experiment.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I have no complaints if you wish to continue. But I'd rather use this
time to perform another experiment than record unnecessary data.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: That said, I don't seem to be carrying anything useful. Hm...
choice_data_list: Can we use seawater for anything?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...Seawater, you say? Of course, swimming isn't the only thing you can
do in the ocean. But what are we to do without the right tools?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Don't tell me you were thinking of drinking it?
choice_data_list:
Maybe we could freeze it and use it to ice
injuries?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Icing... Considering today's weather, the temperature of the ocean
must be over twenty-five degrees Celsius. Not the ideal temperature
for ice.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm, your idea is banal yet has its merits. For instance, I never
would've come up with that idea myself.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
By focusing the water on your muscle contractions, we could collect
new data—No, that would only retain heat. Hm...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I've decided! The ocean possesses its own unique salinity, buoyancy,
and tidal friction. We must verify how your body will react to these
elements!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I see, this is very interesting data indeed. Not quite enough to prove
my theory...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But if I focus my research in this direction, then surely a breakthrough
is inevitable!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh-heh... This will work, I'm sure of it! Trainer, it's time to
compile the data! Lend me a hand!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We return to the dorm and begin sifting through today's data. Of
course, we pull an all-nighter experimenting as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Yawn... A good morning to you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I must express my gratitude for your cooperation. Thanks to you, I was
able to develop a new medicine based on my theory.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Regrettably, it's still only on paper. I don't have my tools here at
camp, so production will have to wait until we return to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But before that, I'd like to get your opinion on something. Did you
notice anything from our research last night?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I especially want to hear about ways to increase the efficiency of
supplying oxygen to the muscles during contraction. Tell me all that
you know.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You see, there's a certain value in the opinion of an amateur. Your
opinions are novel—even your simple questions spark my interest.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Most importantly, you're the only one who goes along with my
experiments. I'm expecting great things from you, my guinea pig
assistant!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You're a capable test subject, and your perspective is invaluable.
Holistically speaking, what are you if not my assistant?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Guinea pigs and assistants are equally invaluable to a researcher like
myself. So if you ever have an interesting thought, share it with me!
I'm all ears!
choice_data_list:
I see you're finally listening to what I have to
say.

I see you're finally listening to what I have to
say.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, have I not been? Hm, perhaps we could call this another step
towards the potential we seek.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Rejoice, Trainer! This single step will indubitably lead us down a
greater path.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And with that out of the way, let us resume our experiments! Our time
here is finite, after all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I miscalculated yesterday, but this time I'll work you to the brink of
your limit! Let us begin, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tachyon makes me run despite my lack of sleep, and before I know it,
I've reached my limit once again...
